compiled_state.title: Flaky test: test-merge-to-main.sh fails in full suite but passes in isolation

comments.body: Classification: behavioral, Score: 1 (BASIC). Likely root cause: test_parallel_validation_faster_than_serial uses wall-clock timing assertion (sleep 2, threshold 3500ms) that is fragile under CPU contention when 8 tests run in parallel.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Fix verified: ticket worktree git commits now skip pre-commit hooks
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
